channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [MASTEK] Mastek Secures £15 Million Contract with Financial Conduct Authority
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Mastek (UK) Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary of Mastek Limited, has secured a two-year contract with the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) worth £15 million. The contract, which could be extended for another two years, is for engineering and development work to support the FCA’s Digital Delivery Hub. The partnership reinforces Mastek’s growing influence as a specialist provider for high-integrity regulatory bodies and is a significant step in Mastek’s UK growth journey.

  • Mastek secures a £15 million contract with the Financial Conduct Authority (FCA)
  • The contract is for two years with a possible extension of another two years
  • The partnership will support the FCA’s Digital Delivery Hub
  • Mastek was selected based on its deep engineering expertise, contextual understanding, and proven track record
  • The deal marks an important step in Mastek’s UK growth journey

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MASTEK LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [MAXHEALTH] Max Healthcare Institute Grants 50,000 Stock Options Under Employee Stock Option Scheme 2022
item.description:
Max Healthcare Institute Ltd has approved the grant of 50,000 stock options to an eligible employee under Max Healthcare Institute Limited - Employee Stock Option Scheme 2022 (MHIL ESOP - 2022). The options, each convertible into one fully paid-up equity share, will vest not earlier than 1 (one) and not later than 5 (five) years from the date of grant. The exercise price is 900 per stock option.

  • Grant of 50,000 stock options under MHIL ESOP - 2022 to an eligible employee.
  • Each stock option convertible into one fully paid-up equity share having a face value of 10 each.
  • Options to vest not earlier than 1 (one) and not later than 5 (five) years from the date of grant.
  • Exercise price of each stock option is 900.
  • MHIL ESOP - 2022 governed by the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [AKZOINDIA] Akzo Nobel India Ltd Receives Order from Madhya Pradesh GST Department
item.description:
Akzo Nobel India Ltd has received an Order from the Madhya Pradesh GST Department on 16th March 2026, following a Show Cause Notice issued on 24th September 2025. The Notice was regarding the issuance of multiple E-Way Bills for the same invoice under u/s 74 of CGST/SGST Act, 2017, with a demand of Rs. 21,03,822/-. However, after the Company's response and submission of supporting documents, the Asst. Commissioner of GST and Central Excise, Division — 1, Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh GST Department reviewed the response and issued an order with a Nil demand. As a result, the original Demand Notice stands annulled.

  • Akzo Nobel India Ltd received an Order from the Madhya Pradesh GST Department
  • The Order was in response to a Show Cause Notice issued on 24th September 2025
  • The Notice was regarding the issuance of multiple E-Way Bills for the same invoice
  • The Company submitted a response with supporting documents
  • The Asst. Commissioner of GST and Central Excise reviewed the response and issued an order with a Nil demand, annulling the original Demand Notice

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Akzo Nobel India Limited | Category: Legal

item.title: [ISGEC] ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd Issues Standby Letter of Credit for CAD 2 Million to Secure Working Capital Loan for Its Canadian Subsidiary
item.description:
ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd has issued a Standby Letter of Credit (SBLC) of CAD 2 million to secure an additional working capital loan facility for its wholly owned subsidiary, Eagle Press & Equipment Co. Ltd, Canada. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors in a meeting held on November 13, 2025. The SBLC was issued on March 16, 2026, in favor of Royal Bank of Canada, Canada, the banker of Eagle Press & Equipment Co. Ltd., Canada. This move will help Eagle Press to draw working capital loans from its bankers to execute new orders and manage increased business levels.

  • ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd issues Standby Letter of Credit for CAD 2 million.
  • The SBLC is issued in favor of Royal Bank of Canada, Canada.
  • The SBLC secures an additional working capital loan facility for Eagle Press & Equipment Co. Ltd, Canada.
  • This decision was approved in a Board Meeting held on November 13, 2025.
  • This move will help Eagle Press to manage increased business levels.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [SHREECEM] Shree Cement to Incorporate Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Mauritius
item.description:
Shree Cement Ltd. has announced the approval of the incorporation of a Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Shree Cement (Mauritius) Limited, in Mauritius. The new company will be engaged in the business of installation and operation of Cement, Blending, Storage and Packaging facilities of Cement, Trading of Cement, Clinker, Coal and other materials including all related and connected activities. The incorporation is expected to be done with 100% subscription to the initial paid-up share capital in cash. The initial authorized capital of the new company is MUR 5,000,000.

  • Shree Cement to incorporate a Wholly Owned Subsidiary in Mauritius
  • New company to be named Shree Cement (Mauritius) Limited
  • New company to be engaged in Cement and related businesses
  • 100% subscription to the initial paid-up share capital in cash
  • Initial authorized capital: MUR 5,000,000

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHREE CEMENT LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ISGEC] ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd. Issues Standby Letter of Credit for CAD 2 Million to Secure Working Capital Loan for Its Canadian Subsidiary
item.description:
ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd. has issued a Standby Letter of Credit (SBLC) of CAD 2 million in favor of Royal Bank of Canada, Canada to secure an additional working capital loan facility for its wholly owned subsidiary, Eagle Press & Equipment Co. Ltd., Canada. This decision was approved by the Board of Directors in a meeting held on November 13, 2025. The SBLC will help Eagle Press to draw working capital loans from its bankers to execute new orders and manage increased business levels.

  • ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd. issues Standby Letter of Credit for CAD 2 million.
  • The SBLC is issued in favor of Royal Bank of Canada, Canada.
  • The SBLC secures an additional working capital loan facility for Eagle Press & Equipment Co. Ltd., Canada.
  • The decision is approved by the Board of Directors in a meeting held on November 13, 2025.
  • The SBLC will help Eagle Press to manage increased business levels.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ISGEC Heavy Engineering Ltd | Category: Loan

item.title: [KALPATPOWR] Kalpataru Projects Secures New Orders Worth Rs. 2,471 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Kalpataru Projects International Limited (KPIL) has secured new orders / notification of awards of approximately Rs. 2,471 Crores. The orders are across various sectors including an underground metro rail project in India, Power Transmission & Distribution (T&D) in India and overseas market, and Buildings and Factories (B&F) business in India. Manish Mohnot, MD & CEO, KPIL, expressed confidence in achieving targets for FY26 with these orders and a healthy pipeline.

  • KPIL secures new orders worth Rs. 2,471 Crores
  • Orders across various sectors including T&D, B&F, and urban transportation
  • Includes an underground metro rail project in India
  • Healthy pipeline and L1 positions
  • Confidence in achieving FY26 targets

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KALPATARU POWER TRANSMISSION LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [CLEANMAX] Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions to Acquire Kintech Solarbikaner for INR 38.06 Crores
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Limited has entered into a Share Purchase Agreement with Kintech Synergy Private Limited and Kintech Solarbikaner Private Limited on 16 March 2026 for the acquisition of 100% equity shares of Kintech Solarbikaner Private Limited. The transaction is for an enterprise value of INR 38.06 crores. Kintech Solarbikaner Private Limited, incorporated in 2023, is involved in renewable energy generation. The acquisition is aimed to enable growth and further development of wind-solar hybrid renewable energy capacity of Clean Max in the state of Gujarat, India.

  • Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions to acquire 100% equity shares of Kintech Solarbikaner Private Limited
  • Transaction value INR 38.06 crores
  • Kintech Solarbikaner Private Limited focuses on renewable energy generation
  • Acquisition aims to expand Clean Max's wind-solar hybrid renewable energy capacity in Gujarat
  • Kintech Solarbikaner Private Limited incorporated in 2023

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [CAMLINFINE] Camlin Fine Sciences Postpones Filing of OPAS for Vinpai Shares, No Squeeze-Out Procedure Intended
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Camlin Fine Sciences Ltd. (CFSL) has announced that it will postpone the filing of a simplified cash tender offer (OPAS) for the remaining shares of Vinpai, a French société anonyme, until early May 2026. The decision is due to administrative constraints related to Indian foreign exchange regulations and the proximity of Vinpai's 2025 annual financial statements publication. CFSL also announced that it no longer intends to implement a squeeze-out procedure for Vinpai shares from the Euronext Growth Paris market, as maintaining the listing will allow Vinpai to retain market visibility and have access to financial markets. This decision supports the financing of CFSL's future projects in Europe.

  • Camlin Fine Sciences postpones the filing of OPAS for Vinpai shares until early May 2026
  • Decision due to administrative constraints and proximity of Vinpai's 2025 annual financial statements
  • CFSL no longer intends to implement a squeeze-out procedure for Vinpai shares
  • Maintaining Vinpai's listing allows for market visibility and financial market access
  • Decision supports financing of CFSL's future projects in Europe

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAMLIN FINE SCIENCES LTD. | Category: Investment

item.title: [ORIENTTECH] Promoters of Orient Technologies Ltd Transfer Shares to CEO Mr. Shrihari Kishor Bhat
item.description:
Orient Technologies Ltd announced an off-market transfer of shares by promoters Mr. Ajay Baliram Sawant, Mr. Jayesh Manharlal Shah, Mr. Ujwal Arvind Mhatre, and Mr. Umesh Navnitlal Shah to the CEO of the company, Mr. Shrihari Kishor Bhat. The total voting rights transferred amount to 70.40%. This move is in accordance with Regulation 29(2) under SEBI (SAST) Regulation, 2011.

  • Orient Technologies Ltd promoters transfer shares to CEO Mr. Shrihari Kishor Bhat.
  • Transfer amounts to 70.40% of the total voting rights.
  • Transfer done in accordance with Regulation 29(2) under SEBI (SAST) Regulation, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Orient Technologies Ltd | Category: Transmission of Shares
